news.title: Vaalco restarts Baobab oil output after FPSO refurbishment
news.description: The refurbishment aims to extend the FPSO’s lifespan and support the 2026 development drilling programme at Baobab.

news.title: How Chevron Turned $1,000 Into $3,500 With Reinvested Dividends
news.description: A Decade of Whiplash, Then a Mega-Deal Ten years ago, Chevron (NYSE:CVX) was clawing out of the 2014 to 2016 oil crash, when Brent collapsed from $111.80 in June 2014 to $30.70 in January 2016. Then came COVID, which dragged Brent to $18.38 in April 2020, the Russia shock that pushed it to $132.72 i

news.title: Columbia Financial (CLBK): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
news.description: Columbia Financial’s 23.1% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 15.1%, and its stock price has climbed to $20.76 per share. This run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

news.title: The Model 3 Era at Rivian Begins. Its Lower-Price EV Is Here.
news.description: Rivian Automotive  has started its Model 3 era.  Investors are hoping the company’s  Tesla  -like strategy leads to Tesla-like returns in the coming years.  Rivian said in a social media post Tuesday that its next electric-vehicle model the R2 SUV, “is here.”

news.title: 2 Reasons to Like ARLO and 1 to Stay Skeptical
news.description: Over the past six months, Arlo Technologies’s stock price fell to $12.68. Shareholders have lost 11.7% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 8%. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

news.title: Palo Alto Networks Hits $10B Revenue Run Rate Beats S&P 500 Across All Timeframes
